content: Latest Embassy Manila alert: Temporary Closure of U.S. Consular Agency in Cebu, March 16–20, 2026. Source article: https://ph.usembassy.gov/temporary-closure-of-u-s-consular-agency-in-cebu-march-16-20-2026/. Issued date: March 10, 2026. Review the linked Embassy notice directly for operational details, affected dates, consular availability, and traveler impact.
